# The Cortex ‚Äî Interrogator Interface

> A cinematic React application for interrogating an autonomous AI Agent mesh.
> Aesthetic: "Dark Glass & Neon" ‚Äî deep slate backgrounds, translucent glass panels, electric blue/purple neon accents.

## Tech Stack

- Framework: React 18+ (Vite 7, TypeScript 5.9)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (dark mode default, custom @theme neon palette)
- Animation: Framer Motion (entrance animations, spring physics, typewriter effects)
- State: Zustand (single store for interview state)
- Data Fetching: TanStack Query (React Query) + axios
- Icons: Lucide React
- Graph: @xyflow/react (React Flow v12) for node-based workflow visualization
- Fonts: JetBrains Mono (code/data), Inter (UI text)
- Backend: FastAPI (Python) with StreamingResponse for SSE-like streaming
- BAML: Contract-driven LLM interaction (bpmn_interview.baml ‚Üí IterateBPMNGraph)
- API Protocol: Server-Sent Events (SSE) with typed events (text, ontology, datahub, graph_update, etc.)
- Live Canvas: `useLiveBpmnGraph` hook maps SSE graph_update ‚Üí React Flow nodes/edges in real time

## Architecture Overview

The app has three main phases, controlled by `InterviewPhase` in the Zustand store:

1. **active** ‚Äî User chats with the mock agent via the Neural Stream. Ontology terms and data bindings accumulate in the HUD sidebar.
2. **blueprint** ‚Äî After 4+ agent responses, the Neural Stream swaps to the Holographic Blueprint (React Flow canvas) showing a node graph of the generated workflow.
3. **compiling** ‚Üí **complete** ‚Äî User clicks "Compile Workflow" triggering a full-screen matrix-style code scroll overlay, ending with a "System Online" success state.

## File Map

```
src/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ main.tsx                          # React entry point
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ App.tsx                           # Root component, phase-based view switching
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ index.css                         # Tailwind v4, @theme neon colors, glass utilities, keyframes
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ store/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ useInterviewStore.ts          # Zustand store: messages, phase, ontologyTerms, dataBindings
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ api/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ types.ts                      # Stream event protocol, BPMN payload models (BPMNTask, BPMNGateway, BPMNSequenceFlow, BPMNPayload), CompileRequest/Response
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ client.ts                     # API client: streamInterviewResponse(), compileWorkflow(), healthCheck()
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hooks/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useAgent.ts                   # Unified hook: auto-switches between real API and mock based on backend health
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useInterviewAgent.ts          # Real API streaming hook (TanStack Query mutation + stream parser)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useCompileWorkflow.ts         # Compilation mutation hook: maps React Flow nodes ‚Üí BPMNPayload, exposes bootLog
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useMockAgent.ts               # Offline fallback: simulates streaming responses locally
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ useMockWorkflowBuilder.ts     # Generates React Flow nodes/edges from interview state
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Layout.tsx                    # App shell: header + two-column layout (main + HUD sidebar)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ NeuralStream/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ NeuralStream.tsx          # Scrollable message list with auto-scroll
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ MessageBubble.tsx         # User/agent message rendering, typewriter cursor
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ThinkingCard.tsx          # Holographic card with ontology scan + DataHub query animations
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ InputBar.tsx              # Glowing neon input bar with gradient focus ring
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ HUD/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ HUD.tsx                   # Right sidebar: ontology map + data bindings + compile button
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ OntologyMap.tsx           # Extracted ontology terms as color-coded glowing tags
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ DataBindings.tsx          # dbt model list with green/red health status dots
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Blueprint/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ WorkflowCanvas.tsx        # React Flow instance with dark dot background, custom controls
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ nodes/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TriggerNode.tsx       # Circular pulse node (green) ‚Äî input sources
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ LogicNode.tsx         # Diamond-shaped glow node (blue) ‚Äî ontology checks
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ActionNode.tsx        # Rectangular node (purple) ‚Äî services/actions, glitch on hover
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ edges/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ AnimatedEdge.tsx      # Pulsing SVG gradient edge simulating data flow
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Compilation/
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ CompileButton.tsx         # Gradient-glow button, calls compile hook, passes bootLog to overlay
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ CompilationOverlay.tsx    # Full-screen terminal boot sequence with color-coded line rendering

backend/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ interviewer_agent.py              # FastAPI BFF gateway: streaming, /workflow/compile (upsert + Dagster reload), /bpmn/*
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ database.py                       # Async SQLAlchemy engine + get_db() FastAPI dependency
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ models.py                         # SQLAlchemy ORM model for bpmn_catalog table
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ pyproject.toml                    # Python deps (fastapi, sqlalchemy, asyncpg, httpx, etc.)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ baml_src/                         # BAML definitions (LLM contract + OpenRouter client)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ sql/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ 001_create_bpmn_catalog.sql   # DDL: bpmn_catalog table + trigger + index
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ .env                              # Backend secrets + DATABASE_URL + DAGSTER_WEBSERVER_URL
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ .env.example                      # Template for backend env vars
```

## Key Patterns

- **Glass panels**: Use `.glass-panel` or `.glass-panel-sm` CSS classes for translucent containers with backdrop blur.
- **Neon colors**: Available as Tailwind classes ‚Äî `text-neon-blue`, `bg-neon-purple/20`, `border-neon-green/30`, etc. Defined in `@theme` block in index.css.
- **Animations**: Custom Tailwind animations ‚Äî `animate-pulse-neon`, `animate-glow`, `animate-breathe`. Use Framer Motion for entrance/exit animations on components.
- **Custom node types**: React Flow nodes are registered as `trigger`, `logic`, `action` in WorkflowCanvas. Each accepts a `delay` data prop for sequential build-sequence animation.
- **API integration**: Components use `useAgent()` which auto-detects backend availability. Falls back to `useMockAgent` when offline.
- **Stream protocol**: Backend sends newline-delimited chunks. Plain text = agent response. `<<TOKEN:args>>` = visual triggers (ontology lookup, DataHub query, etc.).
- **Mock fallback**: When backend is unavailable, `useMockAgent` provides identical UX with local keyword detection.

## Zustand Store Shape

```
{
  messages: Message[]           // Chat history (user + agent)
  phase: InterviewPhase         // "active" | "blueprint" | "compiling" | "complete"
  ontologyTerms: OntologyTerm[] // Extracted concepts { category, label }
  dataBindings: DataBinding[]   // Identified dbt models { model, schema, healthy }
}
```

## Stream Event Protocol

The backend sends **Server-Sent Events** (SSE) ‚Äî each event has `event: <type>` and `data: <json>`.

```
event: text               data: {"content": "..."}
event: ontology           data: {"action": "lookup", "label": "..."}
event: ontology           data: {"action": "found", "category": "...", "label": "..."}
event: datahub            data: {"action": "query", "model": "...", "schema": "..."}
event: datahub            data: {"action": "result", "model": "...", "schema": "...", "healthy": true}
event: graph_update       data: {"tasks":[], "gateways":[], "sequence_flows":[], "unresolved_paths":[], "is_ready_to_compile": false}
event: interview_complete data: {}
event: stream_end         data: {}
```

The `graph_update` event carries a `BPMNPayload`-compatible payload (tasks/gateways/sequence_flows) plus `unresolved_paths` and `is_ready_to_compile`. This aligns directly with the `bpmn_catalog` schema for seamless compilation.

## Running

```bash
# Frontend
npm install
npm run dev          # http://localhost:5173
npm run build        # Production build

# Backend (optional ‚Äî frontend falls back to mock mode)
cd backend
uv sync
uv run uvicorn interviewer_agent:app --reload --port 8000
```

## Architecture: Backend-for-Frontend (BFF)

The frontend is "dumb" ‚Äî it only talks to the FastAPI backend on port 8000.
The backend is "smart" ‚Äî it holds all secrets, calls internal services, and proxies data.

- Frontend NEVER calls ontology/DataHub services directly.
- Frontend `.env` contains ONLY `VITE_API_URL`.
- Backend `.env` contains `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`, `ONTOLOGY_SERVICE_URL`, `DATAHUB_SERVICE_URL`.
- BFF proxy routes: `GET /ontology/classes`, `GET /datahub/tables`.

## Environment Variables

Frontend (`.env` at project root ‚Äî bundled into client JS by Vite):
```
VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
```

Backend (`backend/.env` ‚Äî server-side only, NEVER exposed to browser):
```
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-or-...
ONTOLOGY_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:8084
DATAHUB_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:8085
DATABASE_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://iagent:iagent@localhost:5432/iagent
DAGSTER_WEBSERVER_URL=http://localhost:3000
```

## BPMN Catalog Integration

The backend shares the `bpmn_catalog` PostgreSQL table with the `invincible-agent` Dagster backend.

### BAML Contract: `bpmn_interview.baml`

The LLM contract uses `IterateBPMNGraph` (replaces the old `ConductInterview`):
- Accepts: `chat_history`, `user_message`, `current_graph_json`, `available_ontology_classes`, `available_data_sources`
- Returns: `BPMNInterviewState` { nodes[], edges[], unresolved_paths[], is_ready_to_compile, agent_reply }
- **Strict Rule**: Every `ServiceTask` node MUST have `ontology_class` + `data_source` from the injected lists
- Session graph stored in-memory per `session_id` and passed back each turn as `current_graph_json`

### Endpoints
- `POST /workflow/compile` ‚Äî Accepts a `BPMNPayload` (tasks, gateways, sequence_flows), upserts to Postgres, triggers Dagster workspace reload via GraphQL, and returns a `boot_log` terminal string.
- `POST /bpmn/save` ‚Äî Direct BPMN upsert + boot sequence (Phase 1 endpoint).
- `GET /bpmn/catalog` ‚Äî Lists all active workflows.
- `synthesize_boot_sequence()` ‚Äî Generates a multi-line terminal boot log with per-task `[AGENT]` provisioning lines.
- `_reload_dagster_workspace()` ‚Äî Async GraphQL POST to Dagster Webserver's `reloadRepositoryLocation` mutation. Non-fatal on failure.

The React Flow ‚Üí BPMN mapping in `useCompileWorkflow.ts`:
- `trigger` nodes ‚Üí `BPMNTask` (service_task)
- `logic` nodes ‚Üí `BPMNGateway` (exclusive)
- `action` nodes ‚Üí `BPMNTask` (user_task)
- edges ‚Üí `BPMNSequenceFlow`
